title: zornia subsessilis
intro: Zornia subsessilis is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, including dysentery and diarrhea, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Zornia subsessilis include reducing inflammation, treating worm infestations, and providing relief from fever and respiratory problems. Zornia subsessilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
